hero.description: Let artificial intelligence generate engaging, personalized quizzes tailored to any topic. Perfect for educators, students, and lifelong learners.
hero.question: Question 1 of 10
hero.questionText: Where do most pandas live in the world?

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to create, manage, and analyze engaging quizzes.

ai.title: AI-Powered Generation
ai.description: Advanced AI creates perfectly tailored quizzes from any content in seconds.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Get results in milliseconds with our optimized processing engine.

analytics.title: Detailed Analytics
analytics.description: Track performance and gain insights into learning patterns.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Your data is encrypted and never shared with third parties.

sharing.title: Easy Sharing
sharing.description: Share quizzes with students or colleagues with a single link.

design.title: Customizable Design
design.description: Personalize your quizzes with custom themes and branding.

steps.title: How It Works
steps.subtitle: Get started in 3 simple steps and begin your learning journey

step1.title: Choose a Topic
step1.description: Select from hundreds of quiz categories across different subjects and difficulty levels.

step2.title: Take the Quiz
step2.description: Answer AI-generated questions that adapt to your level. Get instant feedback on each answer.

step3.title: Track Progress
step3.description: View detailed analytics, earn badges, and compete on leaderboards with other learners.

categories.title: Explore Quiz Categories
categories.subtitle: Choose from our diverse collection of quiz categories and start learning today

leaderboard.title: Top Learners Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Join the top performers and see how you rank against other learners

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Learning Experience?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of educators and students using QuizAI to create engaging, intelligent quizzes.

contact.title: We're here
contact.subtitle: Whether you have questions about our features, require technical assistance, or wish to share your feedback, our team is ready to help.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: ✓ Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

footer.description: Empowering learners worldwide with AI-powered personalized education.
